title: eurybia furfuracea
intro: Eurybia furfuracea, also known as the rusty eurybia or rusty low eurybia, is a type of flowering plant in the aster family that is native to the northeastern United States. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Eurybia furfuracea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Eurybia furfuracea is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and interactions.
